metadata.description: This is your Plaid client identifier. Provided by Plaid.
If yes, provide the Azure Function Url or custom Url here. If not, leave this blank.
In case you'd rather not configure an Azure Key Vault, this will be used instead. If a valid Azure Key Vault reference is provided, that will be used in lieu of this.

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch>
   <entity name='systemuser'>
      <attribute name='azureactivedirectoryobjectid' />
      <link-entity name='mda_role'
         from='mda_userid'
         to='systemuserid'
         link-type='inner'
         alias='mda_role'>
         <filter type='and'>
         <condition attribute='mda_lastplaidlinktoken'
            operator='eq'
            value='@{triggerBody()?['link_token']}' />
      </filter>
      </link-entity>
   </entity>
</fetch>

<fetch>
   <entity name='systemuser'>
      <attribute name='azureactivedirectoryobjectid' />
      <link-entity name='mda_role'
         from='mda_userid'
         to='systemuserid'
         link-type='inner'
         alias='mda_role'>
         <filter type='and'>
         <condition attribute='mda_lastplaidlinktoken'
            operator='eq'
            value='@{triggerBody()?['link_token']}' />
      </filter>
      </link-entity>
   </entity>
</fetch>

parameters.request/body:
POST [Organization Uri]/api/data/v9.2/$batch HTTP/1.1
OData-MaxVersion: 4.0
OData-Version: 4.0
If-None-Match: null
Accept: application/json
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="batch_body"

--batch_body
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
Content-ID: @{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(triggerBody()?['item_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}

PATCH /api/data/v9.2/mda_accesstokens(mda_plaiditemid='@{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(triggerBody()?['item_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}') HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json; type=entry

{
  "mda_plaidaccessstatus": "@{triggerBody()?['error']?['error_code']}"
}

--batch_body--

POST [Organization Uri]/api/data/v9.2/$batch HTTP/1.1
OData-MaxVersion: 4.0
OData-Version: 4.0
If-None-Match: null
Accept: application/json
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="batch_body"

--batch_body
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
Content-ID: @{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(triggerBody()?['item_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}

PATCH /api/data/v9.2/mda_accesstokens(mda_plaiditemid='@{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(triggerBody()?['item_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}') HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json; type=entry

{

}

--batch_body--

parameters.item/mda_description: The @{body('Flow_run_metadata')?['tags']?['flowDisplayName']} flow failed. You can investigate here.
